popularStory.description:
Sir Roger de Washbourne

The year was 1227. 

Henry III was King of England. 

It was the time of Robin Hood and the Sheriff of Nottingham. 

Richard the Lionheart had died less than 20 years before. …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger d'Wasseburne於1234年7月之前出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾時，他的父親William d'Wasseburne11231歲，母親Lucy of Stanford11231歲。他於大約1258年與Jonne結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1299年在英國武斯特斯爾，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾斯坦福 奧 姆。

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger d'Wasseburne was born before July 1234, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William d'Wasseburne, was 11231 and his mother, Lucy of Stanford, was 11231. He married Jonne about 1258. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1299, in Worcestershire, England, and was buried in Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger d'Wasseburne est né avant juillet 1234, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William d'Wasseburne, avait 11231 ans et sa mère, Lucy of Stanford, avait 11231 ans. Il a épousé Jonne environ 1258. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1299, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger d'Wasseburne vor Juli 1234 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William d'Wasseburne 11231 und seine Mutter Lucy of Stanford 11231. Er hat um 1258 Jonne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1299 in Worcestershire, England und wurde in Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger d'Wasseburneが1234年7月以前にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父William d'Wasseburneは11231歳，母Lucy of Stanfordは11231歳であった。約1258年にJonneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1299年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスタンフォード オン テメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger d'Wasseburne(이)가 1234년 7월 이전 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William d'Wasseburne(은)는 11231세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy of Stanford(은)는 11231세였다. 그는 대략 1258년 Jonne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1299년 영국 워스스터실르에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 스탠퍼드  테에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger d'Wasseburne nasceu antes julho de 1234, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William d'Wasseburne, tinha 11231 anos e sua mãe, Lucy of Stanford, tinha 11231 anos. Ele casou-se com Jonne aproximadamente 1258. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1299, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger d'Wasseburne родился перед июля 1234 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William d'Wasseburne было 11231 год, а матери, которую звали Lucy of Stanford, 11231. Он женился на женщине по имени Jonne около 1258 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1299 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия и был похоронен в местности станфорд он тем, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
